action.reasoning: Observation: baseline CLIP ViT-B/16 fine-tuned for 2 epochs on Sketch reached strong Quickdraw accuracy 0.1835, already validating the pipeline and runtime (~5 min incl eval). Analysis: the closest source domain (Sketch) is highly predictive for Quickdraw, and the short run likely undertrained the classifier/backbone. Decision: run the same validated setup for 10 epochs (under the 20-epoch rule) to test whether longer sketch fine-tuning improves target accuracy, then submit evaluation.
